summary: Phase B Performance Optimization - All Tests Pass. Verified: (1) Noto Sans Arabic font loaded via next/font/google, (2) 6 JSON-LD scripts consolidated into 1 array, (3) Tracking scripts use lazyOnload strategy, (4) SeoLandingPageTemplate lazy-loads RelatedSolutions and TrustBar via dynamic(), (5) CMS endpoints have Cache-Control headers, (6) SafeImage has default sizes prop, (7) All pages render correctly.

minor.issue: Cache-Control headers may be overridden by preview environment proxy

homepage.font_variables: All 4 font CSS variables applied (outfit, dm-sans, tajawal, noto-arabic)

solution_pages.lazy_loading: RelatedSolutions and TrustBar lazy-loaded via dynamic()
solution_pages.auto_seed: Working - triggers after 1.5s if CMS empty

careers_page.cms_reg_wrapper: CmsReg component correctly initializes CMS hook

font_loading.implementation: Noto Sans Arabic moved from CSS @import to next/font/google in layout.tsx

json_ld_consolidation.implementation: 6 separate JSON-LD scripts merged into 1 array
json_ld_consolidation.benefit: Reduces DOM nodes and parse time

tracking_scripts.implementation: 7 scripts changed from afterInteractive to lazyOnload
tracking_scripts.benefit: Defers non-critical scripts until page idle

lazy_loading.implementation: RelatedSolutions and TrustBar in SeoLandingPageTemplate via dynamic()

cache_headers.note: May be overridden by preview environment proxy

responsive_images.implementation: SafeImage has default sizes prop for responsive images

preconnects_cleanup.implementation: Removed unnecessary preconnects to fonts.googleapis.com (Next.js handles font loading)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_phase_b_perf_idempotent entry for idempotent test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B Performance Optimizations completed. Font loading optimized with next/font/google (including Noto Sans Arabic). JSON-LD consolidated to single array. Tracking scripts use lazyOnload. SeoLandingPageTemplate lazy-loads RelatedSolutions and TrustBar. CMS endpoints have Cache-Control headers. SafeImage has default sizes prop. All 10 tabs visible in Admin CMS.
